summary: No blocking issues found in the main...impl/gap-018 diff. The branch appears to satisfy the GAP-018 dependency-bounds/constraints contract and keeps the change scoped to ops/docs/tests.
contract_items_verified: Reviewed branch diff file list against main: pyproject.toml, constraints.txt, tests/test_env_versions.py, README/docs/dashboard/progress/research updates; no src/railway_lakehouse data-path code changed.
GAP-018 DoD: pyproject.toml declares requires-python >=3.12,<3.15, pandas>=2.2,<4, pyarrow>=15,<25; existing S3 pins remain exact; [spark] extra remains untouched.

GAP-018 DoD: constraints.txt is committed at repo root with Python 3.14.0 header/regeneration command and pins pandas==3.0.3, pyarrow==24.0.0, s3fs/fsspec/aiobotocore/botocore, plus runtime/test closure.

GAP-018 DoD: tests/test_env_versions.py is unit-marked, deterministic/offline, checks installed pandas/pyarrow windows, cross-checks pyproject bounds via tomllib, verifies constraints.txt pins pandas/pyarrow, and includes negative helper assertions for wrong-major windows.
GAP-018 DoD/docs: README.md and docs/VERIFICATION.md document pip install -e ".[test]" -c constraints.txt and the drift guard; docs/GAP_REGISTER.md records GAP-018 closure and test mapping.

Dashboard/progress sync: docs/TASKS.md and docs/index.html reflect GAP-018 done without claiming GAP-017/Spark completion; docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md and .planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md include handoff entries.
AGENTS.md Hard Rules: raw Bronze untouched; no numeric merge or LLM path changed; no fabricated data-path outputs introduced; no runtime outputs outside output/ added.
